name: scikit-bio
tagline: Python scikit-bio reference: sequences, alignment, phylogenetics, diversity/ordination stats, and bioinformatics file I/O.
verdict: Well-organized, accurate library reference with concrete runnable examples, declared dependencies, and a version field. Weak spots: no scope-limiting guidance (misfire risk on adjacent bio/data tasks), no failure handling for missing files, tools, or bad formats, and the install command is unpinned (though from the standard registry).

highlights.summary: Install unpinned: 'uv pip install scikit-bio' (line 429) — well-known package, no version pin.
No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere despite broad 10-capability scope, risking misfire on adjacent data tasks.
No failure-path guidance: multi-step workflows (BIOM/tree/alignment I/O) never address missing files, bad formats, or install failures.
